name: 11L VRL + Full GPTQ + BigramHash3072 + Parallel Muon + Legal SGD TTT (ADIITJ)
author: Atharva Date
blurb: Forked from PR #549 (abaybektursun, 1.1194 SOTA). Adds: (1) VRL (Value Residual Learning, arxiv:2410.17897) on all 11 layers — layer-0 V output blended via learned sigmoid gates; (2) Full GPTQ (Hessian Cholesky int6 error compensation, 256 calib batches); (3) BigramHash 1536→3072; (4) Tight SWA preferred over EMA. NOTE: run on instance without torch.compile support — only 2002 training steps (300ms/step uncompiled vs SOTA 83ms/step compiled). Artifact 18.8MB exceeds 16MB limit due to low-entropy weights at 2002 steps. Preliminary result — proper rerun with torch.compile pending.
